name: 05 — Claude Code Session Logger (Decisions → AFFiNE + SurfSense)

nodes.name: Session Log Webhook
nodes.notes: Called by Claude Code via AUTOMATE: at end of session

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {"model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "max_tokens": 1200, "system": "You extract structured decision logs from dev session notes. Return valid JSON only: {"summary": string, "decisions": [{"what": string, "why": string, "alternatives_rejected": string}], "files_changed": [string], "next_steps": [string], "tech_debt": [string]}", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Extract a structured decision log from this dev session:

Project: " + $json.project + "

Session notes:
" + $json.notes}]} }}

meta.description: Claude Code calls this via AUTOMATE: log session. Extracts decisions/next steps. Saves to AFFiNE + indexes in SurfSense for future research.
meta.usage: In Claude Code: AUTOMATE: log this session to AFFiNE. Project: MyApp. Notes: [paste what was built and decided]
